mapper.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${tableName} ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, key VARCHAR(512) UNIQUE NOT NULL, value TEXT, metadata JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_${tableName}_key ON ${tableName} (key)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_${tableName}_created_at ON ${tableName} (created_at)
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector
INSERT INTO ${tableName} (key, value, metadata) VALUES (?, ?, ?::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value, metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
SELECT value, metadata FROM ${tableName} WHERE key = ?
SELECT value, metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM ${tableName} WHERE key = ?
SELECT key FROM ${tableName} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ?
